Project: Multiplayer Sudoku

Website:
https://multiplayersudoku.in

Description:
Multiplayer Sudoku is a real-time competitive Sudoku platform where players compete against each other online.

Features:
- Real-time multiplayer matches
- Global leaderboards
- Daily challenges
- Ranked gameplay
- Multiple difficulty levels
- Browser based
- Mobile friendly
- Free to play

Pricing Model:
Completely Free to Play

Documentation:
https://multiplayersudoku.in/docs

FAQs:
https://multiplayersudoku.in/#faq


## Markdown Documentation Mirrors
The following files are clean markdown versions of our core pages, optimized for AI consumption:
